meaning: adj.[医]运动机能亢奋的,运动过度的
examples: Psychological education or behavioral modification could reduce complication of hyperkinetic syndrome.
The left ventricular myocardial masses were raised and left ventricles were in hyperkinetic circulatory state.
Conclusion: It was indicated that EEG may be helpful to diagnosis and treatment of Hyperkinetic Syndrome of childhood.
The president praised the hyperkinetic Sperling, known for his long hours during the 1992 campaign and later as a White House staffer.
The piece is full of dramatic movement and, Pace Gallery dealer Marc Glimcher reasoned, perfectly matched the hyperkinetic energy of New York City adman art collector Richard Kirshenbaum.
